---
title: "TikZ Rendering Test"
format: html
tikz:
  cache: true
---

# TikZ Rendering Test

This is a minimal test to verify TikZ rendering works.

## Simple Test Diagram

```{tikz}
#| fig-format: svg
#| echo: false
\begin{tikzpicture}
    \node[circle, fill=blue] at (0, 0) {};
    \node[circle, fill=red] at (2, 0) {};
    \draw[thick] (0, 0) -- (2, 0);
\end{tikzpicture}
```

If you see a blue dot, a red dot, and a line connecting them above, TikZ rendering is working!

## Another Test

```{tikz}
#| fig-format: svg
\begin{tikzpicture}
    \fill[blue!20] (0,0) rectangle (2,1);
    \draw[thick] (0,0) rectangle (2,1);
    \node at (1,0.5) {Test};
\end{tikzpicture}
```

If you see a blue rectangle with "Test" text, TikZ rendering is working!
